query:
SELECT EXISTS(
                SELECT 1 FROM (
                    SELECT c.organisation_id FROM applications a
                    JOIN campaigns c on a.campaign_id = c.id
                    WHERE a.id = $1
                ) ca
                JOIN organisation_members m on ca.organisation_id = m.organisation_id
                WHERE m.user_id = $2 AND m.role = 'Admin'
            )
